2604.15203.title: MADE: A Living Benchmark for Multi-Label Text Classification with Uncertainty Quantification of Medical Device Adverse Events
2604.15203.paper_summary: Machine learning in high-stakes domains such as healthcare requires not only strong predictive performance but also reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ) to support human oversight. Multi-label text classification (MLTC) is a central task in this domain, yet remains challenging due to label imbalances, dependencies, and combinatorial complexity. Existing MLTC benchmarks are increasingly saturated and may be affected by training data contamination, making it difficult to distinguish genuine reasoning capabilities from memorization. We introduce MADE, a living MLTC benchmark derived from {m}edical device {ad}verse {e}vent reports and continuously updated with newly published reports to prevent contamination. MADE features a long-tailed distribution of hierarchical labels and enables reproducible evaluation with strict temporal splits. We establish baselines across more than 20 encoder- and decoder-only models under fine-tuning and few-shot settings (instruction-tuned/reasoning variants, local/API-accessible). We systematically assess entropy-/consistency-based and self-verbalized UQ methods. Results show clear trade-offs: smaller discriminatively fine-tuned decoders achieve the strongest head-to-tail accuracy while maintaining competitive UQ; generative fine-tuning delivers the most reliable UQ; large reasoning models improve performance on rare labels yet exhibit surprisingly weak UQ; and self-verbalized confidence is not a reliable proxy for uncertainty. Our work is publicly available at https://hhi.fraunhofer.de/aml-demonstrator/made-benchmark.
2604.15203.paper_summary_zh: 機器學習在如醫療保健等高風險領域，不僅需要強大的預測性能，還需要可靠的不確定性量化（UQ）來支持人類監督。多標籤文本分類（MLTC）是這個領域中的一個核心任務，但由於標籤不平衡、依賴性和組合複雜性，仍然具有挑戰性。現有的MLTC基準越來越飽和，可能受到訓練數據污染的影響，這使得區分真正的推理能力和記憶變得困難。我們介紹了MADE，一個基於醫療設備不良事件報告的動態MLTC基準，並不斷更新新發布的報告以防止污染。MADE具有長尾分佈的層次標籤，並通過嚴格的時間劃分實現可重複評估。我們在超過20個編碼器和解碼器模型下，建立了微調和少量樣本設置的基準（指令調整/推理變體，本地/API可訪問）。我們系統地評估了基於熵/一致性和自我表述的UQ方法。結果顯示出明顯的權衡：較小的區別性微調解碼器在保持競爭性UQ的同時，實現了最強的頭尾準確性；生成性微調提供了最可靠的UQ；大型推理模型在稀有標籤上提高了性能，但顯示出驚人的弱UQ；而自我表述的信心並不是不確定性的可靠代理。我們的工作可在 https://hhi.fraunhofer.de/aml-demonstrator/made-benchmark 上公開獲得。
2604.15203.author: Raunak Agarwal et.al.
2604.15203.authors: Raunak Agarwal, Markus Wenzel, Simon Baur, Jonas Zimmer, George Harvey, Jackie Ma
